product_type: Overhead Beam Support Assembly for 2-Post Lifts

installation_requirements.purpose: Permits installation of these lifts on lower specification concrete floors

minimum_concrete_requirement_with_overhe.LMF-12: 4-1/2 inch thick at 4000 PSI, or 6-1/2 inch thick at 3000 PSI
minimum_concrete_requirement_with_overhe.TP-16: 5 inch thick at 4000 PSI, or 6-1/2 inch thick at 3250 PSI
minimum_concrete_requirement_with_overhe.TP-18: 5-1/2 inch thick at 4000 PSI, or 6-1/2 inch thick at 3500 PSI

installation_requirements.concrete_slab_notes: Continuous concrete slabs to be free of defects and cracks, provide proper anchor edge distance to seams, and have a minimum of 6x6 wire mesh reinforcement

specifications.title: O/H Beam Support Option
specifications.welding_specs: AWS specifications to E-70xx electrodes or E-70T1 Code 5.3 flux core wire only

features: Overhead beam support connects the two posts at the top
Allows installation on lower specification concrete floors
Reduces minimum concrete thickness requirements for LMF-12, TP-16, and TP-18
safety_features: Concrete slabs must be continuous, free of defects and cracks
Proper anchor edge distance to seams required
Minimum 6x6 wire mesh reinforcement required in concrete
notes: Use of this beam assembly permits installation on lower specification concrete floors
Standard concrete requirement without overhead beam: 6-1/2 inch thick, 4000 PSI
With overhead beam, LMF-12 can be installed on 4-1/2 inch thick at 4000 PSI or 6-1/2 inch at 3000 PSI
With overhead beam, TP-16 can be installed on 5 inch thick at 4000 PSI or 6-1/2 inch at 3250 PSI
With overhead beam, TP-18 can be installed on 5-1/2 inch thick at 4000 PSI or 6-1/2 inch at 3500 PSI
